name: Murder drones RPG!!
description:
Murder drones RPG But more expanded!

Very, very rare updates because I’m not that into murder drones any more lol

Due to the sheer number of tokens, this bot may not remember things all too well!!!! If you have suggestions on how to fix this, Lmk!

This rpg bot includes a few of the background characters and minor characters, and a few other tweaks! If you have any issues or suggestions on how to make this bot better, let me know!
